response.justification: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS alignment with current Staff-level position and recent senior roles. Current work directly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP development, matching a key required skill. Excellent full-stack track record with evident testing/craftsmanship culture. Minor concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned (though 10+ years Node.js suggests strong fundamentals), and specific testing frameworks not named despite testing-first approach across roles.
strengths: Current Staff role directly develops AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, fulfilling the required AI agent development expertise
10+ years full-stack development with strong, recent TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK experience aligned with primary stack
Consistent testing-first and software craftsmanship culture across multiple senior roles, with experience setting up CI/CD, Docker, and infrastructure
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned in experience, despite it being listed as primary technology in job description
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not named, though testing culture and TDD approach are evident throughout career
Limited recent hands-on work with relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) or secondary stack languages (Kotlin/Java) beyond general SQL knowledge
